description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a brick exterior and a dark, steeply pitched gable roof. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch supported by columns, flanked by a garage on one side and a landscaped garden on the other. Large rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides, providing ample natural light to the interior. The driveway leads to a double garage, and a concrete walkway connects the street to the main entrance. The rear of the house is simpler, with additional windows and a small backyard area. The property is set on a rectangular green lawn, bordered by minimal landscaping and a single tree.
description: A two-story brick suburban house with a dark gable roof, symmetrical windows, a covered front porch, and an attached garage, set on a green lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, double garage, landscaped garden, and walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long brick wall, garage side, and driveway extending to the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a simpler facade with several windows and a small backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, garden beds, and the driveway curving toward the garage.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, steps, and a decorative front door
